message:
feat(FJ-P2C-005-D): cache module boundary skeleton — backend trait, LRU eviction, persistence wire format, key stability harness

New modules in fj-cache:
- backend.rs: CacheBackend trait + InMemoryCache + FileCache implementations
- eviction.rs: LRU eviction wrapper with entry count and byte budget limits
- persistence.rs: FJC\x01 wire format with SHA-256 integrity verification
- stability.rs: golden key reference harness for drift detection

Also fixes EffectContext.thread_token() to overwrite duplicate effect
names (preserving BTreeMap parity after Vec optimization in f3f7523).

14 new tests (21 total in fj-cache), 396 workspace tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
